introSection: Wild Waves is a steel roller coaster located at Playland's Castaway Cove in Ocean City, New Jersey, USA. It was originally intended to open alongside GaleForce in 2016, however both attractions were delayed. Wild Waves opened on September 7, 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster wraps around GaleForce, but is a more tamer, family roller coaster. It was originally going to be painted white, but was left unpainted due to time constraints during construction.

fullText:
Wild Waves is a steel roller coaster located at Playland's Castaway Cove in Ocean City, New Jersey, USA. It was originally intended to open alongside GaleForce in 2016, however both attractions were delayed. Wild Waves opened on September 7, 2017.

This roller coaster wraps around GaleForce, but is a more tamer, family roller coaster. It was originally going to be painted white, but was left unpainted due to time constraints during construction.
